form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Sandown then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fifth (29.70) at Mt Gambier. Best figures puts him right in this and well worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a winner three back at Sandown then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fifth (29.70) at Mt Gambier. Best figures puts him right in this and well worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on March 29 over 500m at Bendigo behind Regal Jyle beaten 9 lengths (28.48). This appears within her reach.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on March 29 over 500m at Bendigo behind Regal Jyle beaten 9 lengths (28.48). This appears within her reach.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was a strong winner after racing just off the speed, scoring by one length in a Grade 5 at Warragul and clocking an excellent 25.72 for the 460m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was a strong winner after racing just off the speed, scoring by one length in a Grade 5 at Warragul and clocking an excellent 25.72 for the 460m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5 FIN last start at Shepparton, recording a scintillating 21.82 for the 390m journey. In form and must include in calculations at odds.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5 FIN last start at Shepparton, recording a scintillating 21.82 for the 390m journey. In form and must include in calculations at odds.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when second (25.71) at Shepparton, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time when second (25.71) at Shepparton, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 1.5 lengths (30.11) over 525m at this track. In line for a hat-trick. Must include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 1.5 lengths (30.11) over 525m at this track. In line for a hat-trick. Must include.

form.formComment: Has won his last two. Good effort to score just six days ago over 425m at Bendigo by 3.5 lengths in a SE. Can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has won his last two. Good effort to score just six days ago over 425m at Bendigo by 3.5 lengths in a SE. Can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked in home straight.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Sandown over 515m in 29.66. Followed that up with a minor placing over 525m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Rates highly on best form. Must include.
